name: 08f · Parent w/ crashing child (wired)
description: Live e2e for subworkflow-failure-propagation, handled branch. Calls 08c-unwired-failure (always crashes) via a SubWorkflow node whose error handle IS wired to a Failure node + End. The child crash propagates to this parent and routes to the handler, so the parent COMPLETES (instance 'completed' with an error envelope) instead of crashing. Requires 08c to seed first.
